description: Style NoteTraditionally designed fot the tennis pros, the nike Air Serve Return is a great looking design that'll go well with casual ensembles too. The comfy inner and stylish upper makes this a closet essential!Product DetailsSynthetic upper with a blunt toe and perforations in the toe boxHas a padded tongue and inner with mesh inlays at the lace regionHas central lace ups and a foamy rubber midsoleTPU outsole with exaggerated herringbone grooves and an arched midfootMaterial and CareSyntheticClean with a leather brushDo not store under sunlight or wash
